title: Components, Cycles, Topological Order, and Unweighted Paths Â· Cost-Model Clinic: Path Reconstruction
summary: Validate a deployment dependency plan and explain unreachable service routes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa path reconstruction increment in a dependency analyzer with path evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reconstruct an actual path from predecessor evidence instead of reporting reachability alone.
Produce and validate a topological order or return concrete cycle evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
